entry.title: All over Central Asia bussiness trip exploring and multi day expeditions
entry.summary: All over Central Asia bussiness trip exploring and multi day expeditions KGZ- KZ- UZ-TJ-TR🇰🇬🇰🇿🇺🇿🇹🇯🇹🇲 -Car transfers -Touring guides -Yurt camp Bookings -Hotel Bookings -Guest house Bookings -Horseback riding -Biking -Hiking -Food tasting -Meet local family for tea -Cook in wild with guide -Sky watch, stargazing…
entry.content:
All over Central Asia bussiness trip exploring and multi day expeditions
KGZ- KZ- UZ-TJ-TR🇰🇬🇰🇿🇺🇿🇹🇯🇹🇲
-Car transfers
-Touring guides
-Yurt camp Bookings
-Hotel Bookings
-Guest house Bookings
-Horseback riding
-Biking
-Hiking
-Food tasting
-Meet local family for tea
-Cook in wild with guide
-Sky watch, stargazing
-Fishing
-4*4 SUV tours
-Helicopter flight over glaciers

📍Tian Shan Mountains, Madygen Dinosaurs Geopark Pamir Mountains, Wakhan Corridor, Kazakh Steppes, Mangistay Plateau
